arts.ttl: Report: Palace retain top spot with dominant display against Hammers
arts.sum: Crystal Palace Under-18s made it three wins in a row with a quality showing against West Ham United at Copers Cope. A brace from Benji Casey, along with a late strike from Donte Martin saw the side come away with all three points.

arts.ttl: Palace man rejects new contract offer
arts.sum: Crystal Palace youngster Franco Umeh-Chibueze has reportedly rejected the club’s offer of a new contract, putting his future in doubt. The 20-year-old has been at Selhurst Park since joining from Cork City in 2024, but he’s struggled to establish himself in his time in London so far. According to Africa Foot, it now looks like […] The post Palace man rejects new contract offer appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace will not block Adam Wharton from England call-up should ex-Blackburn midfielder make Thomas Tuchel’s first squad
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner says Crystal Palace will not block Adam Wharton from joining up with England if he is called up to Thomas Tuchel’s first squad. “If not, he will join the England squad.”
